parameters.formDescription: Fill this in right after finishing a job. The customer gets the review text within a minute.

values.fieldLabel: Service Done (e.g. drain unclog, AC tune-up)

assignments.name: GOOGLE_REVIEW_LINK
assignments.value: CHANGE ME — client's Google review short link

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ "model": $node["Set Config"].json.MODEL, "temperature": 0.7, "messages": [ { "role": "system", "content": "You write review-request SMS messages for a local business. Rules: under 300 characters, warm and human, thank the customer by first name, mention the specific service, include the review link exactly as given, end with 'Reply STOP to opt out.' Never sound corporate. At most one emoji. Output ONLY the SMS text." }, { "role": "user", "content": "Business: " + $node["Set Config"].json.BUSINESS_NAME + "
Customer first name: " + String($node["Job Complete Form"].json["Customer Name"]).split(" ")[0] + "
Service done: " + $node["Job Complete Form"].json["Service Done (e.g. drain unclog, AC tune-up)"] + "
Review link: " + $node["Set Config"].json.GOOGLE_REVIEW_LINK } ] }) }}

parameters.name: To
parameters.value: ={{ $node["Job Complete Form"].json["Customer Phone (with country code, e.g. +15551234567)"] }}

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ "model": $node["Set Config"].json.MODEL, "temperature": 0.7, "messages": [ { "role": "system", "content": "You write one gentle follow-up SMS asking for a Google review, 2 days after the first ask. Under 240 characters. Grateful, zero pressure, include the review link exactly, end with 'Reply STOP to opt out.' Output ONLY the SMS text." }, { "role": "user", "content": "Business: " + $node["Set Config"].json.BUSINESS_NAME + "
Customer first name: " + String($node["Job Complete Form"].json["Customer Name"]).split(" ")[0] + "
Service done: " + $node["Job Complete Form"].json["Service Done (e.g. drain unclog, AC tune-up)"] + "
Review link: " + $node["Set Config"].json.GOOGLE_REVIEW_LINK } ] }) }}

parameters.name: To
parameters.value: ={{ $node["Job Complete Form"].json["Customer Phone (with country code, e.g. +15551234567)"] }}
